calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant AJ Frazier, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Michelle Tong. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:20 a.m., adjourning at 10:46 a.m. and reconvening at 10:48 a.m.

Eric Jun, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Benjamin Seeman, Senior Credit and Collections Manager for plaintiff's Assignor, Motive Technologies, Inc., (f/k/a "KeepTruckin") was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Jun and Seeman appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant AJ Frazier, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Open Book Account, Reasonable Value and Account Stated was filed on May 24, 2021.
Plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents were served on defendant AJ Frazier, Inc.'s Registered Agent of Process via US Mail, with return receipt requested, (CCP Section 415.40) on June 21, 2021. Service was effectuated on July 1, 2021.
Default as to defendant AJ Frazier, Inc. was entered on August 9, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 12, 2021.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Additional Terms and Conditions for "KeepTruckin"..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: "KeepTruckin's" Customer Account for AJ Frazier, Inc.......................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant AJ Frazier, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,856.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,860.31.
Attorney Fees - $1,380.00.
Costs - $550.69.

Total - $34,647.50.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepared the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:54 a.m.
